steps.name: Click on 'System administration' in the Header
Click 'Gateway' tab
Select 'CompanyForTestRunOnly Inc.' company using filter
Select 'MerchantCompanyForTestRunOnly Inc.' business unit using filter
Click 'Connect acquirer MID' button
Select 'acquirer for gateway GBP' acquirer MID within dialog
Click 'Create' button
Hover over 'Connect acquirer MID' button
Verify that 'Connect acquirer MID' button tooltip appears on the Gateway page
Hover over 'Reset filter' button
Verify that 'Reset filter' button tooltip appears on the Gateway page
Hover over 'Move acquirer MID down' button
Verify that 'Move acquirer MID down' button tooltip appears on the Gateway table
Hover over 'Move acquirer MID up' button
Verify that 'Move acquirer MID up' button tooltip appears on the Gateway table
Hover over 'Deactivate acquirer MID' button
